title: Technoforge
description: Modpack with coding and technology related mods and more
body:
Who is this modpack for?

This modpack is made for people who like playing minecraft and are programmers. It includes mods like CC: Tweaked, which adds custom lua scripting, Create, which let's you make crazy contraptions and Ad Astra which let's you go to space.

Q & A

  • Q: Does it work in multiplayer?
A: Yes! If the server includes the same mods.

  • Q: How many mods does it have?
A: 80+ mods.

  • Q: What modloader does it use?
A: It uses Fabric.
Have fun! Special Thanks to t_ratt for letting us use his Launchers mod for this modpack!! https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/launchers
